mail.password_reset.subject: Reset password — :app
mail.password_reset.title: Reset password
mail.password_reset.lead: Someone requested a new password for :email on :app.
mail.password_reset.expiry: This link expires in :count minutes. After that, request a new email from the “Forgot password” page.
mail.password_reset.ignore: If you did not request this, ignore this email — your password will stay the same.
mail.password_reset.copy_hint: If the button does not work, copy the link into your browser
mail.verify_email.subject: Confirm your email — :app
mail.verify_email.title: Confirm your email address
mail.verify_email.lead: Please confirm :email for your :app account by clicking the button below.
mail.verify_email.expiry: This link expires in :count minutes. After that, request a new message in your account (Profile).
mail.verify_email.ignore: If you did not sign up on this site, you can ignore this email.
mail.verify_email.copy_hint: If the button does not work, copy the link into your browser
You are receiving this email because we: You are receiving this email because we received a password reset request for your account.
This password reset link will expire in: This password reset link will expire in :count minutes.
If you did not request a password reset,: If you did not request a password reset, no further action is required.
validation.min.string: The :attribute field must be at least :min characters.
validation.confirmed: The :attribute field confirmation does not match.
validation.password.letters: The :attribute field must contain at least one letter.
validation.password.mixed: The :attribute field must contain at least one uppercase and one lowercase letter.
validation.password.numbers: The :attribute field must contain at least one number.
validation.password.symbols: The :attribute field must contain at least one symbol.
validation.password.uncompromised: The given :attribute has appeared in a data leak. Please choose a different :attribute.
Please click the button below to verify: Please click the button below to verify your email address.
If you did not create an account, no fur: If you did not create an account, no further action is required.
